fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200

# ==== Box: U+0452
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 413 0 /uni0452
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0452"
move 1400
